title: reminders-v1
description: Apple Reminders service contract v1 — 10 operations across lists, items, search, due dates, and writes.

operations.name: lists
operations.description: List all reminder lists with counts

operations.name: items
operations.description: Get reminders from a list with completion filters

operations.name: search
operations.description: Search reminders by title text across all lists

operations.name: item
operations.description: Get a single reminder by ID or name

operations.name: create
operations.description: Create a new reminder with title, list, due date, priority, notes

operations.name: complete
operations.description: Mark a reminder as completed or uncompleted

operations.name: update
operations.description: Update reminder properties (title, due date, priority, notes, flagged)
